prompt: Tap big blind anchor before selecting river line.
why_v1: River response uses seat role context with final-street intent.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The big blind remains the out-of-position defender on the river, so anchoring it first explains the more careful final-street line.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The big blind is still the forced defender on the river, so anchor it first. Acting without position changes how careful that final-street choice should be.
